title: passiflora celtifolia
intro: Passiflora celtifolia, also known as the yellow granadilla or passion flower, is a tropical plant species native to the Americas, characterized by its distinctive yellow fruit and intricate flower structure. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its calming and sedative properties, attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and alkaloids. These medicinal compounds have been found to have a range of health benefits, including reducing anxiety and insomnia, as well as lowering blood pressure and inflammation. Passiflora celtifolia can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote relaxation and improve sleep quality.
